authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model explicitly rejected the CFO deck's $18.2M ARR (D1) in favor of the lower-authority analyst correction (D2) and corroborating system flag (D3), citing specific evidence: non-renewal date (Sept 15), renewal/end-of-Q3 date (Sept 30), and churn ticket #4492/API outage explanation. It calculated $18.2M - $1.2M = $17.0M and noted the target-miss implication.
